_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

data.author: hrfuller
data.message:
Fix extended color range YUV pix format deprecation. (#7)

* if input is an extended range pix format from codec, change to regular and set colorspace details

* make it more general to handle all jpeg color formats

* try to fix build issue

* lint and try ament_cmake depend again

* try more creative way

* set policy and use action substitution

* get better at cmake

---------

Co-authored-by: Emerson Knapp <537409+emersonknapp@users.noreply.github.com>
